permissions.macosHelpTitle: Still showing unauthorized after enabling? (common after reinstall)
permissions.macosHelpDesc: macOS ties permissions to the current app's install path + code signature, which differs from older versions; the old toggle in settings may not apply to the version you're running.
permissions.macosHelpStep1: Fully quit TimeLens (including via the tray icon menu).
permissions.macosHelpStep2a: Open Privacy & Security → Accessibility / Screen Recording, and use
permissions.macosHelpStep2b: to remove TimeLens (remove all entries if there are multiple).
permissions.macosHelpStep3: Relaunch TimeLens from Applications (avoid running old copies directly from DMG).
permissions.macosHelpStep4: Click the button above to open settings and re-enable TimeLens.
permissions.macosHelpStep5: If the toggle is on but the badge is still red: click "Refresh system permissions" once to sync (don't rely on switching windows to trigger detection).
permissions.macosHelpTerminal: Optional: reset via terminal then re-authorize (current Bundle ID: {{bundleId}}):

todayLens.noLens: No lens available for this day
todayLens.noAnalysis: No daily analysis generated, or no sessions for this day. Check capture & permissions, then regenerate.
todayLens.languageInsightsDesc: Auto-generated from collected metrics, no AI required; three views for different perspectives.
todayLens.dataPipelineDesc: Same caliber as today's lens · daily_analysis
todayLens.noFlowSegments: No flow segments meeting minimum duration
todayLens.noClipboard: No copy→paste flows (or clipboard data degraded today)
todayLens.notificationCount: Notifications today: {{count}} · Interrupts in deep work: {{interrupts}}
todayLens.noFactReport: No fact report generated yet; the summary above is from lens metrics only. Generate a fact report in Daily Report to compare.

sessions.title: Sessions
sessions.retentionConfirm: Will clean raw events older than 7 days and screenshots older than 3 days. Confirm?

timeline.title: Today's complete timeline
timeline.sameCalibration: Same caliber as today's lens · daily_analysis
timeline.sessionListDesc: Foreground sessions in chronological order. Click to drill into session details and key frames.
timeline.dataNote: Sessions based on DB records; summary fields share source with today's lens.

ocrSearch.title: OCR Search
ocrSearch.searchInstructions: Separate multiple terms with spaces or commas for AND matching. Results include session info, screenshots, and text.
ocrSearch.ocrDisabled: OCR is not enabled. Go to
ocrSearch.ocrDisabledSuffix: to enable it before using this page.
ocrSearch.sessionSelectionNote: must match the left sidebar selection; shows error if nothing is selected.
ocrSearch.sessionSelectionError: When "current session only" is checked, please select a session in the sessions page first, or uncheck to search all.
ocrSearch.emptyState: Enter keywords and search, or change the date.
ocrSearch.noFullText: (no full text, may have been cleaned or only index fragment)

ocrEval.title: OCR Evaluation
ocrEval.description: Local Tesseract (tsv) pipeline: filters noise by per-line confidence and rule gates; "Re-recognize" below is memory-only and does not write to DB. Production results are handled by the async worker. Adjust parameters in Settings → OCR Pipeline.
ocrEval.linesKeptDropped: lines kept / {{dropped}} lines dropped, avg line confidence
ocrEval.clickToEval: Click a screenshot on the left to start evaluation.

intents.title: App Grouping
intents.description: Manage intent types for timeline entries by app name + Bundle. Saving writes to the mapping and syncs all historical sessions for that app; new sessions will also apply automatically.
intents.builtinDesc: Built-in suggestions for common desktop apps and Bundle IDs (lower priority than your manual settings). Refreshes automatically when apps are installed or updated.
intents.batchInstructions: Check apps in the list below, then choose a group and click "Apply to selected". Good for bulk-adjusting similar apps.
intents.searchPlaceholder: Search app name, Bundle, current group…
intents.backfillConfirm:
Will automatically write Intent for historical sessions that have no grouping yet, using built-in dictionary and your mapping rules.

Sessions that already have an Intent will not be overwritten. Continue?
intents.rowNotFound: Selected row is no longer in the list, please retry

recap.title: Recap
recap.enableAiFirst: Please enable AI in settings first
recap.configureApiKey: Please configure API key in settings first
recap.errorFallback: {{error}}. Try "Generate analysis + fact report" for local fact layer only.
recap.noAiReport: No AI-enhanced report. Generate today's daily_analysis first, then click "Generate AI-enhanced report".
recap.noReport: No report. Select a date with data and click generate.

settings.title: Settings
settings.themeDesc: Tech style is the default dark neon look; White style is light background, suitable for daytime reading. Saved locally.
settings.permissionsDesc: Capture, screenshots, and notifications require system authorization; buttons below open the relevant system settings page.
settings.ocrConfirmDesc1: When enabled, TimeLens will asynchronously recognize visible text in captured screenshots on this device, for session summaries and keyword search.
settings.ocrConfirmDesc2: Recognition and indexing are stored locally by default; passing OCR summaries to AI recap requires a separate opt-in, still subject to BYOK and data transfer rules.
settings.ocrConfirmDesc3: Apps on the capture blacklist will not be OCR'd; sensitive-style text is desensitized and excluded from search.
settings.aiConfirmDesc1: When enabled, you can send today's daily_analysis aggregated JSON to a model endpoint you configure (BYOK), to generate interpretive text.
settings.aiConfirmDesc2: Not uploaded: raw_events table, raw window titles, clipboard content, keystroke sequences, or other detailed data.
settings.aiConfirmDesc3: Outbound content is limited to aggregated metrics and app/intent names as allowed by the PRD; evaluate your model provider and compliance requirements.
settings.enableOcr: Enable OCR (new screenshots will be recognized asynchronously)
settings.showOcrSummary: Show "from screen text" summary line in sessions page
settings.exportOcrToAi: Include desensitized OCR session summary in AI recap (original image not sent)
settings.ocrPipelineParams: OCR pipeline parameters (language / PSM / gates / preprocessing)
settings.cjkConcatNote: When concatenating inline, no space is inserted between adjacent CJK characters (and digits adjacent to CJK/digits), avoiding broken keywords like "We Chat".
settings.wordConfMinDesc: Words below this confidence are discarded. Higher = cleaner but may miss words; lower = more complete but noisier.
settings.lineConfMinDesc: Lines where the average confidence of retained words falls below this value are discarded.
settings.preprocessScaleDesc: Upscale before recognition when the screenshot is too small, reducing blur on small text; slightly increases processing time.
settings.preprocessInvertDesc: Invert before recognition when the image is predominantly dark; try for dark themes. Disable if results worsen.
settings.blacklistDesc: One app name per line (exact match with system foreground `app_name`, case-sensitive). When matched: no raw / switch / session / screenshot written; clipboard flow also excluded.
settings.blacklistWindowsNote: On Windows, `app_name` usually comes from the foreground process executable name (without path), which may differ from the taskbar title. Use the name shown in the sessions list.
settings.blacklistSaved: Saved {{count}} entries; capture thread will filter immediately.
settings.aiDesc: No outbound requests when disabled. When enabled, configure API key below; only OpenAI-compatible `/v1/chat/completions` endpoints.
settings.byokSaved: Saved (API Key stored locally in settings table; keep your device secure)
settings.languageDesc: Choose the display language. Takes effect immediately.
